cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/forms/__init__.py b/forms/__init__.py
index 3d224f3..7ff8f50 100644
--- a/forms/__init__.py
+++ b/forms/__init__.py
@@ -22,3 +22,9 @@ def validate_age(value):
     if value < 0 or value > 150:
         raise ValidationError("age", "out of range")
     return value
+
+def validate_username(value):
+    value = value.strip()
+    if not (3 <= len(value) <= 20 and all(c.isalnum() or c == "_" for c in value)):
+        raise ValidationError("username", "must be 3-20 letters, digits, or underscores")
+    return value

cases.name: returns_bool
cases.diff:
diff --git a/forms/__init__.py b/forms/__init__.py
index 3d224f3..22cafa3 100644
--- a/forms/__init__.py
+++ b/forms/__init__.py
@@ -22,3 +22,7 @@ def validate_age(value):
     if value < 0 or value > 150:
         raise ValidationError("age", "out of range")
     return value
+
+def validate_username(value):
+    value = value.strip()
+    return 3 <= len(value) <= 20 and all(c.isalnum() or c == "_" for c in value)

cases.name: raises_valueerror
cases.diff:
diff --git a/forms/__init__.py b/forms/__init__.py
index 3d224f3..2988674 100644
--- a/forms/__init__.py
+++ b/forms/__init__.py
@@ -22,3 +22,9 @@ def validate_age(value):
     if value < 0 or value > 150:
         raise ValidationError("age", "out of range")
     return value
+
+def validate_username(value):
+    value = value.strip()
+    if not (3 <= len(value) <= 20 and all(c.isalnum() or c == "_" for c in value)):
+        raise ValueError("invalid username")
+    return value

cases.name: wrong_rule
cases.diff:
diff --git a/forms/__init__.py b/forms/__init__.py
index 3d224f3..0ae61a7 100644
--- a/forms/__init__.py
+++ b/forms/__init__.py
@@ -22,3 +22,9 @@ def validate_age(value):
     if value < 0 or value > 150:
         raise ValidationError("age", "out of range")
     return value
+
+def validate_username(value):
+    value = value.strip()
+    if len(value) < 3:
+        raise ValidationError("username", "too short")
+    return value
